title: thymus bracteosus subsp. aranjuezii
intro: Thymus bracteosus subsp. aranjuezii is a subspecies of the thyme plant, a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Thymus bracteosus subsp. aranjuezii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
